title: asplenium latibasis
intro: Asplenium latibasis is a type of fern commonly known as the 'Hidden Spleenwort' due to its unique habit of growing in shaded, humid environments and often being overlooked. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Asplenium latibasis is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting liver health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Asplenium latibasis can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
